race.comment: CLASSIC TWO (1) had mixed luck in Hong Kong and is expected to go close third-up in a winnable contest. Sat on the good speed before fading to run fifth in a tight finish over 1350m at Wyong. Placed at the trip and will prove hard to run down with map favours. SATONO JASMINE (7) strengthened over the break with an encouraging on-pace third over 1350m at Wyong. Can get off the mark quickly this prep and overcome the sticky gate. PROPANE (11) deep into the campaign and finally draws a low gate. Covered plenty of ground in the run when he jumped in trip for a fading seventh over 1900m at Newcastle. Blinkers go on and deserves another chance. AURORA EFFECT (3) massive flop as the ($1.30 fav), when covered ground early and over raced with the blinkers added for a tiring ninth over 1600m at Wyong. Blinkers come off and has placed in the heavy going. Improver.
